title: Coolite
description: This visualizes the cooldown of Hoplite's items!
body:
# Coolite

A lightweight Fabric client-side mod that displays item cooldowns as a HUD overlay.

Designed for servers using custom cooldown systems via the Apollo protocol.

---

## Features

- **Cooldown HUD** — Shows active item cooldowns with a progress bar and remaining time
- **Custom Model Data support** — Renders the correct custom item texture when a CMD is assigned
- **Configurable position & scale** — Place the HUD anywhere on screen
- **Left / Right layout** — Choose whether the HUD grows to the right or to the left

---

## Usage

| Action | Description |
|---|---|
| `/coolite` | Open the config screen |
| Mod menu | Click the config button on the Coolite entry in [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) |

### Config options

| Option | Description |
|---|---|
| X / Y | HUD position as a 0–1000 screen ratio |
| Scale | HUD size multiplier (0.1–10.0) |
| L / R | Direction the HUD expands toward |

> **Note:** The default HUD position may not suit your screen resolution or GUI scale.
> It is strongly recommended to open the config screen and adjust the position and scale to fit your setup before playing.
> The config screen shows a live preview so you can fine-tune it in real time.

---

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.x
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) *(optional — for in-game config access)*

---

## Notes

> This mod is intended for use on specific servers that send cooldown data via the Apollo protocol.
> It will not display anything on servers that do not support this.

---
